import { useMatch } from "./useMatch.js"; function useLoaderData(opts) { return useMatch({ from: opts.from, strict: opts.strict, structuralSharing: opts.structuralSharing, select: (s) => { return opts.select ? opts.select(s.loaderData) : s.loaderData; } }); } export { useLoaderData }; //# sourceMappingURL=useLoaderData.js.map
